title: miersia humilis
intro: Miersia humilis, also known as the low-growing miersia or dwarf miersia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Miersia humilis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Miersia humilis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs.
